title: Arcana Publish Pipeline
subtitle: From commit to npm — v0.1.0 partial; v0.1.1 fixed; v0.2.0 ships FTS+hybrid
purpose: Shows the publish path for v0.x. v0.1.0 was partial (workspace:* not rewritten). v0.1.1 corrected via pnpm publish -r. v0.2.0 ships the FTS+hybrid sprint — minor bump per semver due to additive contract methods (searchFulltext, asOf).
publish_order: contracts first (no workspace deps), then core, testkit, provider-libsql, provider-sqlite-vec in any order
publish_status: v0.2.0 live since 2026-05-20 (FTS+hybrid sprint); v0.1.1 superseded

lanes.label: v0.1.0 — Manual publish (PARTIAL — do not rely on)
issues: Used npm publish instead of pnpm publish -r — workspace:* deps were NOT rewritten to real version numbers
arcana-provider-sqlite-vec did not exist yet at time of v0.1.0 attempt

stages.label: bun run lint
stages.note: Script exists; vacuously passes with no packages (--no-error-on-unmatched-pattern)

stages.label: bun run typecheck
stages.note: Script exists; guard skips tsc -b until packages/*/tsconfig.json exists

stages.label: bun run test
stages.note: Vitest passes; 212 tests, 5 packages as of v0.1.1

lanes.label: v0.1.1 — Manual publish (correct approach — pnpm publish -r)

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: All 5 packages live; workspace:* deps rewritten

lanes.label: v0.2.0 — FTS+hybrid sprint publish
lanes.semver_rationale: Minor bump: searchFulltext added to StructuredStore contract, FulltextMatch/FulltextSearchOpts/FulltextField types added, kernel hybridSearch result shape changed (no prior consumers — was throwing), asOf added as optional param (backward compatible). All changes additive at the consumer level.

stages.label: pnpm publish -r --filter='./packages/*' --access public
stages.note: OTP browser flow completed by user; all 5 packages live

stages.label: git tag v0.2.0 && git push --tags
stages.note: pending — runs after this data refresh commits

stages.label: publish.yml: for each pkg in dep order, npm view → skip or publish
Re-run on same tag is no-op
